name: Oracle Construction & Engineering (Aconex/Primavera) API
what_it_does: Oracle Construction and Engineering REST APIs for the Aconex document management and Primavera P6 project scheduling platforms. Enables AI agents to manage project document control and correspondence workflow through Aconex for AEC project collaboration, handle engineering document transmittal and review workflow automation, access Primavera P6 project schedule data including WBS, activities, and resource assignments for schedule analysis, retrieve project cost management and budget tracking data, manage RFI (Request for Information) and submittal workflow for construction project delivery, access site inspection and punch list data for quality management, handle project risk register and issue tracking data, retrieve earned value management (EVM) data for project performance analytics, manage contractor and subcontractor document package workflows, and integrate construction project data with ERP, BIM, and field management platforms.
use_cases: Automating document routing from Aconex project management agents
Analyzing project schedules from Primavera P6 integration agents
Managing RFI workflows from construction coordination agents
Tracking project costs from EVM analytics agents
not_for: Residential construction without enterprise AEC document management needs
Simple project management without construction-specific workflow requirements
Small capital projects without enterprise scheduling and document control
best_when: A capital project owner, EPC contractor, or large construction program using Oracle Aconex and/or Primavera P6 wants AI agents to automate document control, schedule analysis, RFI management, cost tracking, and project performance reporting.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Aconex is the system of record for construction contract documents — automated document approval or routing errors create contractual disputes and claims exposure. Primavera P6 schedule baseline changes require change management process; automated schedule updates without baseline controls create schedule integrity issues. Construction document workflows have regulatory implications (building permits, safety submittals); verify approval chain before automation.

auth.notes: Oracle Construction APIs use OAuth 2.0. Aconex and Primavera P6 have separate API surfaces under Oracle Construction and Engineering Cloud. Oracle acquired Aconex (2018, $1.2B). Primavera P6 long part of Oracle portfolio. Webhooks for document workflow events. REST API with JSON. Austin, Texas (Oracle HQ). Strong in large capital projects: infrastructure, oil & gas, and government. Competes with Autodesk Construction Cloud and Trimble for AEC project management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — Oracle Cloud subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual Oracle Cloud subscription; per-project and per-user pricing
pricing.notes: Austin, Texas. Oracle Corporation (ORCL NYSE). Aconex acquired 2018 for $1.2B. Primavera P6 acquired from Primavera Systems (2008). Global construction document management: 70,000+ projects, 2M+ users across 70+ countries. Strong in infrastructure megaprojects and oil & gas EPC. Primavera P6 is industry standard for large project scheduling. Competes with Autodesk ACC, Trimble, and Bentley for AEC market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in Oracle developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Aconex is the contractual document system of record; automated document approval or status changes without proper authorization chain creates contract claims exposure

Aconex vs. P6 separate APIs — Aconex (document management) and Primavera P6 (scheduling) are separate Oracle products with different API surfaces; both may be needed for full project management automation
P6 baseline management — Primavera P6 baseline schedule is change-controlled; automated schedule updates must go through baseline change process to maintain schedule integrity
Aconex organization structure — Aconex projects have organization-specific document number schemas, review workflows, and register configurations; API data models vary by project configuration
FedRAMP for government — Oracle Aconex/P6 FedRAMP authorization applies to federal government deployments; verify FedRAMP boundary for US government project use
Document workflow automation — Aconex review workflows have contractual deadline implications; automated document routing errors affecting response deadlines create contract claims
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction project management. SOC2, ISO27001, ISO19650, FedRAMP. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Construction contract documents and project schedules.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction document control. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP. OAuth2. US/EU. Contract documents and project data.
